name: Pacific Gold Traders
description_short: Pacific Gold Traders is a pawn shop in San Pedro, CA specializing in buying, selling, trading, and loaning modern and antique items with competitive pricing.
description_long:
Pacific Gold Traders operates as a pawn shop located at 825 S Pacific Ave in San Pedro, California. The business has established itself as a community fixture for collateral-based lending and merchandise transactions in Los Angeles County. The company's business model centers on traditional pawn operations where customers can leverage personal valuables for quick cash.

The shop offers comprehensive pawn services including buying, selling, trading, and loaning against items. Their merchandise inventory spans both modern items and antiques, creating a diverse selection for customers interested in purchasing used goods. They specialize in gold and jewelry transactions and are noted for their fair pricing on these high-value items. The business accepts delivery as a service option and provides free street parking for customers.

Pacific Gold Traders distinguishes itself through operational cleanliness and organization, with customers specifically praising the well-maintained, spacious store layout. Staff members, including notably Steve, are highlighted for professionalism, friendliness, and genuine customer care. The business has earned recognition for fair negotiation practices on loans and purchases, with customers noting competitive loan amounts compared to other shops in the area. Their location in San Pedro provides convenient access for local customers.

While the company maintains positive customer sentiment overall, some operational inconsistencies have been noted regarding published hours and communication about reopening times. The business has not yet completed the verification process on its directory listing. With zero verified reviews currently posted despite the positive narrative description, independent third-party validation of service quality remains limited. The lack of comprehensive review data should be considered when evaluating reliability.
address: 825 S Pacific Ave, San Pedro, CA 90731

pros: Clean, spacious, and well-organized store environment that enhances browsing experience
Competitive loan amounts and fair pricing on gold and jewelry compared to other local pawn shops
Knowledgeable and friendly staff (including named employee Steve) known for professionalism
Wide inventory range from modern items to antiques, appealing to diverse customer needs
Convenient San Pedro location with free street parking available
Successful customer negotiations described as mutually beneficial
Community involvement and reputation for business integrity
cons: Zero verified customer reviews despite positive narrative descriptions, limiting independent validation
Business owner/representative has not completed verification process on directory listing
Noted inconsistencies with published operating hours and communication about reopening times
Website categorization inconsistency (listed under both pawn shops and musical instruments/teachers)
Limited transparency on specific loan terms, interest rates, or fee structures
best_for: Local San Pedro residents needing quick cash loans against personal valuables
Gold and jewelry sellers looking for fair market pricing and competitive offers
Antique buyers and sellers seeking diverse inventory in a clean, organized environment
diagnosis: Pacific Gold Traders is best for San Pedro-area customers seeking traditional pawn services, particularly those with gold, jewelry, or antiques to sell or pawn for quick cash. The main caveat is the complete absence of verified customer reviews and unfinished business verification, which limits ability to independently confirm the positive attributes described on their directory listing.
services: Pawn loans against personal items and valuables
Gold and jewelry buying and selling
